use std::fs;
use std::io::BufRead;

fn count_lines_matching(path: &str, pattern: &str) -> std::io::Result<usize> {
    // BAD: read entire file into String, then iterate lines
    let contents = fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let count = contents
        .lines()
        .filter(|line| line.contains(pattern))
        .count();
    Ok(count)
}
